mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND post_status = true
SELECT * FROM post WHERE category = #{category} AND post_status = true
SELECT * FROM post WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND post_status = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( category, title, content, images, max_participants, participants, recruitment_status, date, location, post_status, created_at, updated_at, member_id ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{maxParticipants}, #{participants}, #{recruitmentStatus}, #{date}, #{location}, #{postStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{memberId} ) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, participants = #{participants}, recruitment_status = #{recruitmentStatus}, date = #{date}, location = #{location}, post_status = #{postStatus}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE post SET post_status = false, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
